2606.09037.title: A Multi-Agent System for IPMSM Design Optimization via an FEA-AI Hybrid Approach
2606.09037.paper_summary: Interior permanent magnet synchronous motor (IPMSM) design requires balancing conflicting objectives and multi-physics constraints, while modern optimization workflows face three bottlenecks: manual problem setup, high finite element analysis (FEA) cost, and unreliable surrogate-based search in sparse or out-of-distribution regions. To address these limitations, we propose an end-to-end automated IPMSM design optimization framework that integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for structured problem definition with an uncertainty-aware FEA-AI hybrid optimization pipeline. A Design agent, connected to a motor textbook through RAG, provides domain-knowledge-based options and engineering tips, and compiles an optimization card and a design-of-experiments plan for AI-model training. A Training agent automates electromagnetic FEA, records geometry-validation and solver-failure logs, analyzes failed geometries using ANOVA-based data analysis and LLM reasoning, and invokes a Design Sampling agent to redefine the design space and generate additional samples. An Optimization agent performs GA-based search with uncertainty-driven switching: low-uncertainty candidates are evaluated by AI-surrogate inference, whereas high-uncertainty and reliability-critical Pareto-front or top-K candidates are corrected by high-fidelity FEA and reused for iterative retraining. The framework converts manual, experience-dependent configuration into a reproducible workflow that balances computational cost and prediction reliability. Experimental results under a matched high-fidelity FEA budget show that the proposed hybrid approach achieves better objective performance while maintaining low and further reducible predictive uncertainty, outperforming FEA-only search, which is limited by early budget exhaustion, and AI-only search, which converges to a low-confidence optimum.
2606.09037.paper_summary_zh: 內部永磁同步電動機（IPMSM）設計需要平衡相互矛盾的目標和多物理約束，而現代優化工作流程面臨三個瓶頸：手動問題設置、高有限元素分析（FEA）成本，以及在稀疏或分佈外區域中不可靠的代理基搜索。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了一個端到端自動化的IPMSM設計優化框架，該框架整合了增強檢索生成（RAG）以進行結構化問題定義，並配備了一個考慮不確定性的FEA-AI混合優化管道。一個設計代理通過RAG連接到電動機教科書，提供基於領域知識的選項和工程建議，並編制優化卡和實驗設計計劃以進行AI模型訓練。一個訓練代理自動化電磁FEA，記錄幾何驗證和求解器失敗日誌，使用基於ANOVA的數據分析和LLM推理分析失敗的幾何，並調用設計取樣代理重新定義設計空間並生成額外樣本。一個優化代理執行基於GA的搜索，並根據不確定性驅動的切換進行：低不確定性候選者通過AI代理推斷進行評估，而高不確定性和可靠性關鍵的Pareto前沿或前K候選者則通過高保真FEA進行修正並重新用於迭代再訓練。該框架將手動、依賴經驗的配置轉換為可重複的工作流程，平衡計算成本和預測可靠性。在匹配的高保真FEA預算下的實驗結果顯示，所提出的混合方法在保持低且可進一步降低的預測不確定性的同時，實現了更好的目標性能，超越了僅基於FEA的搜索，後者受到早期預算耗盡的限制，以及僅基於AI的搜索，後者收斂於低信心的最優解。
2606.09037.author: Jinseong Han et.al.
2606.09037.authors: Jinseong Han, Sunwoong Yang, Namwoo Kang
